evals.prompt: Harden my Aura Auth config for production: env file setup, prevent git tracking of secrets, safest cookie strategy, and trusted origins for app.example.com + localhost.
evals.expected_output: Provides a complete security plan with .env/gitignore guidance, secure cookie choices, and trustedOrigins static policy.

evals.prompt: We are behind Cloudflare and Nginx. Should we enable trustedProxyHeaders? Also give me session jwt best practices with issuer, audience, maxAge, and maxExpiration.
evals.expected_output: Gives conditional trustedProxyHeaders decision criteria and a secure JWT session configuration with explicit issuer/audience/expiration guidance.

evals.prompt: Explain sealed vs signed vs encrypted jwt modes in Aura Auth and recommend the best option for an admin dashboard handling sensitive claims.
evals.expected_output: Accurately compares JWT modes and recommends sealed with risk-based rationale for sensitive admin use case.
